verses.text: Kei pen Sharon gamsunga a om gamlak pak, mualkuam sunga a om unok pak bang ka hi lel hi.
Tua bang hilo a, ka ngaihno pen numei khempeuh lak panin ling laka a om unok pak tawh kibang hi.
Ka ngaihno tangval dang tawh teh lehang gamlak singkung laka a om epel kung tawh kibang hi. Ama liimah ka tu nuam a, a gahte lim ka sa hi
Annekna phualah hong paipih in la, itna mai tawh hong en in
Lungzuang, duangvul ka hih manin leenggahkeu tawh hong vak in la, epel gah tawh hong thadimsak in
A veilam baan hong khamsak a, a taklam khutin kei hong kawi hi
Jerusalem nungakte aw, ko' kingaihna nong suknawi lohna dingun sakhi leh sanang tawh kei tungah hong kiciam un.
Ka ngaihno' awging ka za hi. Mualtung tawnin hong tai a, mualte kantanin kei hong zuan hi
Ka ngaihno sanang tawh kibang a, sakhitalno tawh zong a kibang hi. Ka inn pualam uhah ding a, tawlet-ah hong dak zialin kawmvang panin hong en giau hi
Ka ngaihno in ka kiangah thu hong gen a,
Phalbi veng ta a, guah zu nawnlo hi
Gamsung tengah pakte palh a, lasak hun tung ta hi. Gamsung tengah vakhu hamte kiza ta hi
Theite zong min ta a, leenggah pak gim namtui zong kiza ta hi. Hong pai in, ngaihno aw, hong zui in, itluat aw
Suangheng kawm-a vasa bangin nang na bu niloh hi. A ngaihbaang na mai hong musak in la, a lungzuan'huai na awging hong zasak in
“I leengguite pak ta ahih manin ngiano hon in a suksiat ma-in tua ngiano honte man ni,” hong ci hi.
Ka ngaihno keima-a' hi; kei zong ama-a' hi'ng. Amah in unok pakte lakah a tuu cing a
nitak huih vot mateng nitak nitum mateng a cing hi. Sanang bangin mualtunga sakhitalno bangin itluat aw, hong paikik in.
